name: Eggs Fertility sticker booster
description:
<NEW STUFF AND INFO AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS TEXT>

I hope you enjoy it, if got ideas to add more stuff here feels free to notify or comment about it

A medical store in order to fight back the lack of natality made special patches that help with fertility.

but some bad persons was suddently slapping multiple ones against ladies butts in order to turn them into egglaying 'hens' or in other cases put more to made then explode with eggs to get rid of them

A single sticker is safe giving a good fertility, but many of them could overload the lady making them made more eggs than can expel leading to a inevitable burst

"WARNING: Applying this sticker may result in spontaneous oviposition, belly inflation, and accelerated pregnancy.

NEW STUFF HERE:

Extra tags: Hyper, popping, bursting, furry

Original sticker: eggcelerator sticker: causes females to produce eggs faster, a overdoose of them to produce more than can expel dealing eventual bursting if not stabilized

NEW STICKER! The MOOre sticker, causes improved lactation making possible the explosion of the female with a overdoose of them! Could be stopped though if someone manage to milk them before get that critical prssure

NEW STICKER: Cumcow sticker: only affect males causing improved cum production, usualy used by serial poppers to stuff with enough cum a female till she burst like a overinflated condom.

New intros

1 original/ 2 silver feather town/ 3 coast ville/ 4 petria dock/ 5 golden scale/ 6 metropolis

More detail of the locations:

1( no changes for if someone want to be with old version)

2: "silver-feather city"

Description: a city located in desert with egiptian medievo ambience

Often seen species: sparrows, peacocks, gryphons, phoenixes, turkeys, hens, eagles, hippogriffs, cranes, secretary birds, sphinxes, felines and snakes

ACCESS ROUTES: cars, train, planes, desert is not a good place to walk for days

Silverfeather city weather: mostly Windy, slightly cold, and misty giving a magical(or terror) ambience often.

Clothes:egiptian clothes

3:Farm ville:

Description: in this town people live in big houses located at the sides of streets of this relative small town

Often seen species: anthro cows, sheeps, goats, centaurs, bunnies, hens, turkeys, bulls and canines like anthro general species dogs

4-PETRIA DOCK

CITY DESCRIPTION: a artificial city built in the ocean mostly made if metal and gray stone, full of pipes and valves resembling yo a mega petrol oil pump

OFTEN SPECIES: various anthro fish, whales, orcas, sharks, dolphins, seagulls, pufferfishes, sirens, mermaids, nagas, eels

5-GOLDEN SCALE

CITY DESCRIPTION: this city located in the mountains, they live in standar sized houses susing bridges and parks to be around, as many had wings they just fly to destination but for the ones who want to walk they can just chill around or walk by the nice places to enjoy some sights

OFTEN SPECIES: kobolds, anthro dragons, wyverns, oriental dragons, snakes, gryphons, quimeras, cockatrizes

6-METROPOLIS

CITY DESCRIPTION: the main citylf all them being the center and most advanced of them all, dangerous place as the stickers born in this city, some rich people paying high ammounts of money to made people inflates and explode to satisfy their desires, also despite be the most technologicaly advanced socialy is quite primitive as people here hunt more money than safety and morality

OFTEN SPECIES: all species including humans, elvens, goblins, gremlings, orcs, onis

ACCESS ROUTES: all, ships, spacecraft, cars, trains, bus, planes, helicopters, subte

WEATER: cloudy but considerably contaminated thanks to the factory sector

CLOTHES: city clothes woth people trying to peek up with th
